goal: Produce a 30-second 1080p MP4 of the trained policy running, for the Friday client update.
thoughts: record_demo_video wraps the Movie Capture extension (omni.kit.capture.viewport) — the real, supported path. 1080p30 for 30s is ~1GB raw, MP4 compresses to <30MB. If running over SSH, kit must launch with --/app/renderer/enabled=true (headless-with-rendering). Black frames usually mean renderer not warmed — wait 2s before record start.
code:
# Frame the shot first
set_viewport_camera(
    camera_prim="<CINEMATIC_CAMERA_PATH>",
    position=[<X>, <Y>, <Z>],
    look_at=[<TX>, <TY>, <TZ>]
)

record_demo_video(
    output_path="<MP4_PATH>",                  # /home/raj/deliveries/policy_demo.mp4
    duration_sec=<30>,
    fps=<30>,
    resolution=[1920, 1080],
    camera_prim="<CINEMATIC_CAMERA_PATH>",
    warmup_sec=<2>
)

# Fallback if Movie Capture extension missing:
capture_viewport(output_path="<PNG_DIR>/frame_%04d.png", fps=<30>, duration_sec=<30>)
# then ffmpeg locally to MP4.
failure_modes: Black video — renderer not warmed, add warmup_sec
1080p60 at full RT — frame drops, video stutters
